label: Create & Build
description: For businesses with no website or only social media

default.subject: Let's build {{NAME}}'s online presence — free consultation
default.body:
Let's Build Your Online Presence

Professional websites that attract and convert customers

Hi {{NAME}} team,

I came across {{NAME}} while researching local businesses in {{CITY}} and noticed you don't yet have a dedicated website. — your online presence is how customers find you, judge your credibility, and decide to reach out. Today, over 80% of customers search online before visiting a local business. Without a website, you're invisible to that audience.

✓ Custom professional design — built to reflect your brand and convert visitors into customers
✓ Mobile-optimised — looks perfect on every phone, tablet and desktop
✓ Google-ready — local SEO setup so people in {{CITY}} can find you
✓ Contact forms & click-to-call — make it easy for customers to reach you instantly
✓ Fast & secure — SSL certificate, speed optimisation, regular backups
✓ Ongoing support — we keep your site updated so you don't have to

We'd love to show you what a website for {{NAME}} could look like. No obligation — just a free 20-minute call to explore your options.

Book a Free Consultation

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Best regards,
The WebPower Team

WebPower Team

Digital Solutions for Local Businesses
